text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Phew... No matter how many times I ride<n>with
Maruzen, her driving always makes<n>me tense up...
Bright, have you ever<n>been in her car?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I have. She was kind enough to invite me<n>for a
drive just the other day.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! So you know what it's like,<n>then—the sheer
speed that makes you<n>feel like you're going to be
thrown out<n>the window!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Those sudden accelerations that almostpop your eyes out! The scenerywhooshing by in an instant!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Just thinking about it makes my legs all<n>wobbly...
You know what—maybe her<n>driving skills are the
secret to her<n>incredible running!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Actually... I think I dozed off during our<n>drive. I
can't recall much about it.
